TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == mikeliday nu Ameylika ÁĺéŚúčťöäťē∑ mikeliday nu Ameylika "kamu nu Ing, Captain America", ngangan ci ci S-ti-ben¬∑Low-cye-s "Steven Rogers", nipanganngan S-ti-bu¬∑Low-cye-s Steve Rogers" "alahica mapanganngan tu Low-cye-a mikeliday", u tahkalay i man-wi a manggaan a nizatengan tu tada icelangay a iyung. ci Cyaw¬∑Si-mung "Joe Simon" atu ci Cye-ke¬∑Ke-pi a nisanga'an, saayaway tahkal i mikeliday nu Ameylika #1 "1941 a mihca 3 a bulad" ¬∑ÁĺÖŚāĎśĖĮ(Steven Rogers),śöĪÁ®ĪŚŹ≤ŚłĚŚ§ę¬∑ÁĺÖŚāĎśĖĮ(Steve Rogers) , "#1(1941ŚĻī3śúą). nilaculan mikeliday nu Ameylika i sakatusa a pingangayawan, katemu nu ngangayaw a zidayan imahiniay a misanga', hina mapatinaku u manamuahay tu kanatal, itawya pacakatay tu kanatal nu Ameylika atu sapatinak, may-wi mangga zikuz i 1964 a mihcaan a nisanga'an tu cacay icelangay a iyung a sakaput micuayay a lyen-mung. i pinaay a mihcaan zikuz, mikeliday nu Ameylika a mangga i zumaay a kanatal pakala tu pina a lasubu mang ku nipacakayan. i 2016 a mihca 5 a bulad 26 a demiad nipahakal tu mikeliday nu "Ameylika, ci S-ti-bu" #1 patahkal tu mikeliday nu Ameylika u sicumiay sakaput siwa tangah bau a masakaputay. zikuz i, "mikeliday nu Ameylika, S-ti-bu¬∑Low-cye-s" #2 patahkal tu mikeliday nu Ameylika u makedecay nu hung-ku-low a kakalayanay akuma, u patelacay a nazatengan. i 2011 a mihcaan, IGN ayaws nu 100 ngangan a mangaga a cudad icelangay a iyungan u saka 6. 2012 a mihcaan i saicelangay lima a bataan ku micuayay a tademaw" tebanaya saka tusa, 2014 a mihcaan i ayaw nu "25 a ngangan u sakapahay man-wi icelangay iyung a nganganan" tu sakatusa. mikeliday nu Ameylika u ni Man-wi a manngga ayaway ziday a mangga "Timely Comics" u kanamuhanay amangga. i 1940 a ziday uyni migikiway tu likisi pala u kim a zidayay ku mangga, saayaway mikeliday nu Ameylika mangga i 1940 a mihca 12 a bulad milasul patahkal i iciba tu mangga, tatungus uyza a mihcaan atu Cin-cu a kawawan, caay kabatad ku pisaungay nu Te-kow, sibalucu'ay ku nizateng nu mikeliday nu Amelika patahkal tu mangga katuud ku manamuhay. kanahatu yadah tahkal ku malecad atu mikeliday nu Ameylika malecad ku nisanga'an a wayway nu mangga, nika mikeliday nu Ameylika i katuud nu malecaday a nisanga'an atu sakatus a nganganyaw nu kitakit, u sakanamuhanay nu icelangay a iyung. i manggaan, mikeliday nu Ameylika atu kaput niza ci Pa-ci¬∑Pa-en-s musuayaw tu Na-suy, Lipun atu zuma i ngangayawan u nilebu nu ada nu Ameylika. . nika i sakatusa a ngangayaw pahezek hawsa, mikeliday nu Ameylika caay tu kakatuud ku tademaw, patiyamay nu mangga mitanam tu baluhay amahiza naayaway kakapah, nika caay kalaheci. zikuz sangaleb pasatezepen patahkal ku mangga niza. . mikeliday nu Ameylika zikuz i "micuayay sakaput a kanatalÔľÉ4" "1964 a mihca 3 a bulad" tatenga' tu muliyaw micumud, zuma pisakamu, i sakatusa a nganganyaw sazikuzay tu pinaay a demiad, makay pitanam niza nayay ku tademaw a hikuki mudebuay tayza i amis bayu, malakuli tu, u mamapatayaytu. . i mapacuayay sakaput a kanatal namakilim mala sakaputay tu nu kahenulay a tademaw. kilul 1960 a ziday pacumud tu zuma man-wi, malaangangan a malaheci. mikeliday nu Ameylika pasumaden mala cacay "malawlaw nu ayaway anizatengan, mitaneng amatatungus tu 20 seci 60 a ziday nu sakay' a iyung. makay 59 a mihcaan "1964 a mihca 11 a bulad" malingatu, muking a tademaw atu mikeliday nu Ameylika pasasizuma saayaway a nisumad tu cacay a cudad tusa ku kungku a wayway "pabaliw kungku" a mangga. "pabaliw kungku " sazikuzay a cudad "saka 99 a cudad, 1968 a mihca tulu a bulad patahkal, uyni a mangga sumad tu ngangan "mikeliday nu Ameylika", muking a tademaw tahkal ku cacay ku nisulitan a mangga "muking a tademaw atu labuay bayu a tademaw" sakacacay a cudadan, kilul tu saayaway tahkal nu uzipay a mangga "yanay ada muking a tademaw" sakacacay a cudad. cacay a tademaw lecuhan i 1920 a mihcaanay a Ameylika Niw-ye a kuwan May-ha-tun-syatung-cenay a masakapahay ci S-ti-ben¬∑Ke-lan¬∑ "S-ti-bu" ¬∑Low-cye-s "Steven Grant "Steve" Rogers" pakuyucay a Ay-al-lan malimaday Sa-la¬∑Low-cye-s atu Ye-se-bu¬∑ wawa ni Low-cye-s. itawya masakapahay henay ci S-ti-bu. 1940 a mihcaan, i Ameylika milabu ayaw nu sakatusa a ngangayaw, ci Low-cye-s u talakaway a tademaw nika makudus u mikulita a micudaday, sinmung mikawaway tu mikulita atu mangga. zikuz malilid ni A-taw-bu¬∑Si-te-le a tahkal, ci Low-cye-s mitanam a malahitay, nika caay kakapah ku uzip kaian, nika pabalucu' ciniza misulut tu hitay nu Ameylika tu sakakaay nu mikeliday ci Cye-s-te¬∑Bye-li-pu-s a nipiazih, kilul maala ku "muliyaw mitakus tu sakauzip a nabalucu'an". ci Low-cye-s mala u sapitanam tu icelangay a hitay, mizawisay ci Ye-sebu¬∑Lye-ing-s-tan pow-se "Dr. Josef Reinstein" misanga' tu miccidekay a izang, zikuz hinisa ku hitayay caay ku tatenga'ay a singangan ci Lye-ing-s-tan pow-se u ke-sye-cye ci Ya-pow-la-han. malahici ku izang mala u bangcalay tu a tademaw ci S-te-bu, kaicelangen ku tademaw, taliktik, makahemhem atu sipunu'. malahici kuyni nisabalucu'an maydih ci E-s-cin tuynian a nigingkiwan pasengi tu zima a tademaw. mikeliday nu Ameylika tu pinaay a mihcaan tahekal ayzaay a manggaan, makay sakatusa tu tabakiay a ngangayaw nu kitakit mangangayaw atu Na-suy-tang, tayza haca milebu tu baluhay a ada nju Ameylika. itawyaay a kungkuan katuud ku micukaymasay tu ngangan nu mik a kangangayaw nu kitakit mikelulay ci Wi-lyem¬∑Na-s-lang-t eliday nu Ameylika. zikuzan nu sakatusa nu tabakiay e atu ci Cye-bu-luy¬∑Mey-s. sazikuzay u mikeliday nu Ameylika ci Wi-lyen¬∑Pow-en-say-te manamuh tu mikeliday nu Ameylika tu kasenengan tu nikauzip a likisiay nu pahezekay micudad, micici' ciniza tu uzip misumad tu hekal masa ni Low-cye-s ku bihid, matatudungay tu hulic ku nisumad tu ngangan "ci S-ti-bu¬∑Low-cye-s" han, malabaluhay nu "1950 a zidayan a mikeliday nu Ameylika". pabeli cinizaantu atu micudaday nizi ci Cye-ke¬∑Men-low micukaymas tu papepi'ay tu nu icelangay hitay a izang. azihan, yu uheni tatusa mala baluhay mikeliday nu Ameylika atu ci Pa-ci hawsa, masumad kuheni makatal atu misakinih, i sumanahay tu katalawan hina patellid tu tademaw. malawlaw ku balucu' nuheni pacici' tu Ameylika a cen-bu papipazeng tu henian i tatudungay a akutiay, katukuh mangaay ku singki a imelang nuheni. ÁĶźśěú, . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natatinengan

mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ni a-taw-bu*si-t…ô-r~…ĺ…ô a tańßkar~…ĺ, ¶i r~…ĺow- ¶j…ô-s mitanam a mar~…ĺańßitaj, nika ¶aaj kakapańß ku uzip kaian, nika pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶iniza misur~…ĺut tu ńßitaj nu am…ôr~…ĺika tu r~…ĺj…ô-iŇč-s-tan pow-s…ô u k…ô-sj…ô- ¶j…ô ¶i ja-pow-r~…ĺa-ńßan. mar~…ĺańßi ¶i ku izaŇč mar~…ĺa u baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj tu a tad…ômaw ¶i s-t…ô-bu, kai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč…ôn ku tad…ômaw, tar~…ĺiktik, makańß…ômńß…ôm atu sipunu Ē~ °. mar~…ĺańßi ¶i kujni nisabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an majdińß ¶i …ô-s- ¶in tujnian a nigiŇčkiwan pas…ôŇči tu zima a tad…ômaw. mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu am…ôr~…ĺika tu pinaaj a mińß ¶aan tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ajzaaj a maŇčgaan, makaj sakatusa tu tabakiaj a ŇčaŇčajaw nu kitakit maŇčaŇčajaw atu na-suj-taŇč, tajza ńßa ¶a mir~…ĺ…ôbu tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a ada nju am…ôr~…ĺika. itawjaaj a kuŇčkuan katuud ku mi ¶ukajmasaj tu ŇčaŇčan nu mik a kaŇčaŇčajaw nu kitakit mik…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺaj ¶i wi-r~…ĺj…ôm*na-s-r~…ĺaŇč-t …ôr~…ĺidaj nu am…ôr~…ĺika. zikuzan nu sakatusa nu tabakiaj …ô atu ¶i ¶j…ô-bu-r~…ĺuj*m…ô-s. sazikuzaj u mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu am…ôr~…ĺika ¶i wi-r~…ĺj…ôn*pow-…ôn-saj-t…ô manamuńß tu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu am…ôr~…ĺika tu kas…ôn…ôŇčan tu nikauzip a r~…ĺikisiaj nu pańß…ôz…ôkaj mi ¶udad, mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° ¶iniza tu uzip misumad tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ masa ni r~…ĺow- ¶j…ô-s ku bińßid, matatuduŇčaj tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ ku nisumad tu ŇčaŇčan " ¶i s-ti-bu*r~…ĺow- ¶j…ô-s" ńßan, mar~…ĺabar~…ĺuńßaj nu "**** a zidajan a mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu am…ôr~…ĺika". pab…ôr~…ĺi ¶inizaantu atu mi ¶udadaj nizi ¶i ¶j…ô-k…ô*m…ôn-r~…ĺow mi ¶ukajmas tu pap…ôpi Ē~ °aj tu nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj ńßitaj a izaŇč. azińßan, ju uńß…ôni tatusa mar~…ĺa bar~…ĺuńßaj mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu am…ôr~…ĺika atu ¶i pa- ¶i ńßawsa, masumad kuńß…ôni makatar~…ĺ atu misakinińß, i sumanańßaj tu katar~…ĺawan ńßina pat…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺid tu tad…ômaw. mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni pa ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° tu am…ôr~…ĺika a ¶…ôn-bu papipaz…ôŇč tu ńß…ônian i tatuduŇčaj a akutiaj, katukuńß maŇčaaj ku siŇčki a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nuńß…ôni. **, . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natatin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == mikeliday nu Ameylika ÁĺéŚúčťöäťē∑ mikeliday nu Ameylika "kamu nu Ing, Captain America", ngangan ci ci S-ti-ben¬∑Low-cye-s "Steven Rogers", nipanganngan S-ti-bu¬∑Low-cye-s Steve Rogers" "alahica mapanganngan tu Low-cye-a mikeliday", u tahkalay i man-wi a manggaan a nizatengan tu tada icelangay a iyung. ci Cyaw¬∑Si-mung "Joe Simon" atu ci Cye-ke¬∑Ke-pi a nisanga'an, saayaway tahkal i mikeliday nu Ameylika #1 "1941 a mihca 3 a bulad" ¬∑ÁĺÖŚāĎśĖĮ(Steven Rogers),śöĪÁ®ĪŚŹ≤ŚłĚŚ§ę¬∑ÁĺÖŚāĎśĖĮ(Steve Rogers) , "#1(1941ŚĻī3śúą). nilaculan mikeliday nu Ameylika i sakatusa a pingangayawan, katemu nu ngangayaw a zidayan imahiniay a misanga', hina mapatinaku u manamuahay tu kanatal, itawya pacakatay tu kanatal nu Ameylika atu sapatinak, may-wi mangga zikuz i 1964 a mihcaan a nisanga'an tu cacay icelangay a iyung a sakaput micuayay a lyen-mung. i pinaay a mihcaan zikuz, mikeliday nu Ameylika a mangga i zumaay a kanatal pakala tu pina a lasubu mang ku nipacakayan. i 2016 a mihca 5 a bulad 26 a demiad nipahakal tu mikeliday nu "Ameylika, ci S-ti-bu" #1 patahkal tu mikeliday nu Ameylika u sicumiay sakaput siwa tangah bau a masakaputay. zikuz i, "mikeliday nu Ameylika, S-ti-bu¬∑Low-cye-s" #2 patahkal tu mikeliday nu Ameylika u makedecay nu hung-ku-low a kakalayanay akuma, u patelacay a nazatengan. i 2011 a mihcaan, IGN ayaws nu 100 ngangan a mangaga a cudad icelangay a iyungan u saka 6. 2012 a mihcaan i saicelangay lima a bataan ku micuayay a tademaw" tebanaya saka tusa, 2014 a mihcaan i ayaw nu "25 a ngangan u sakapahay man-wi icelangay iyung a nganganan" tu sakatusa. mikeliday nu Ameylika u ni Man-wi a manngga ayaway ziday a mangga "Timely Comics" u kanamuhanay amangga. i 1940 a ziday uyni migikiway tu likisi pala u kim a zidayay ku mangga, saayaway mikeliday nu Ameylika mangga i 1940 a mihca 12 a bulad milasul patahkal i iciba tu mangga, tatungus uyza a mihcaan atu Cin-cu a kawawan, caay kabatad ku pisaungay nu Te-kow, sibalucu'ay ku nizateng nu mikeliday nu Amelika patahkal tu mangga katuud ku manamuhay. kanahatu yadah tahkal ku malecad atu mikeliday nu Ameylika malecad ku nisanga'an a wayway nu mangga, nika mikeliday nu Ameylika i katuud nu malecaday a nisanga'an atu sakatus a nganganyaw nu kitakit, u sakanamuhanay nu icelangay a iyung. i manggaan, mikeliday nu Ameylika atu kaput niza ci Pa-ci¬∑Pa-en-s musuayaw tu Na-suy, Lipun atu zuma i ngangayawan u nilebu nu ada nu Ameylika. . nika i sakatusa a ngangayaw pahezek hawsa, mikeliday nu Ameylika caay tu kakatuud ku tademaw, patiyamay nu mangga mitanam tu baluhay amahiza naayaway kakapah, nika caay kalaheci. zikuz sangaleb pasatezepen patahkal ku mangga niza. . mikeliday nu Ameylika zikuz i "micuayay sakaput a kanatalÔľÉ4" "1964 a mihca 3 a bulad" tatenga' tu muliyaw micumud, zuma pisakamu, i sakatusa a nganganyaw sazikuzay tu pinaay a demiad, makay pitanam niza nayay ku tademaw a hikuki mudebuay tayza i amis bayu, malakuli tu, u mamapatayaytu. . i mapacuayay sakaput a kanatal namakilim mala sakaputay tu nu kahenulay a tademaw. kilul 1960 a ziday pacumud tu zuma man-wi, malaangangan a malaheci. mikeliday nu Ameylika pasumaden mala cacay "malawlaw nu ayaway anizatengan, mitaneng amatatungus tu 20 seci 60 a ziday nu sakay' a iyung. makay 59 a mihcaan "1964 a mihca 11 a bulad" malingatu, muking a tademaw atu mikeliday nu Ameylika pasasizuma saayaway a nisumad tu cacay a cudad tusa ku kungku a wayway "pabaliw kungku" a mangga. "pabaliw kungku " sazikuzay a cudad "saka 99 a cudad, 1968 a mihca tulu a bulad patahkal, uyni a mangga sumad tu ngangan "mikeliday nu Ameylika", muking a tademaw tahkal ku cacay ku nisulitan a mangga "muking a tademaw atu labuay bayu a tademaw" sakacacay a cudadan, kilul tu saayaway tahkal nu uzipay a mangga "yanay ada muking a tademaw" sakacacay a cudad. cacay a tademaw lecuhan i 1920 a mihcaanay a Ameylika Niw-ye a kuwan May-ha-tun-syatung-cenay a masakapahay ci S-ti-ben¬∑Ke-lan¬∑ "S-ti-bu" ¬∑Low-cye-s "Steven Grant "Steve" Rogers" pakuyucay a Ay-al-lan malimaday Sa-la¬∑Low-cye-s atu Ye-se-bu¬∑ wawa ni Low-cye-s. itawya masakapahay henay ci S-ti-bu. 1940 a mihcaan, i Ameylika milabu ayaw nu sakatusa a ngangayaw, ci Low-cye-s u talakaway a tademaw nika makudus u mikulita a micudaday, sinmung mikawaway tu mikulita atu mangga. zikuz malilid ni A-taw-bu¬∑Si-te-le a tahkal, ci Low-cye-s mitanam a malahitay, nika caay kakapah ku uzip kaian, nika pabalucu' ciniza misulut tu hitay nu Ameylika tu sakakaay nu mikeliday ci Cye-s-te¬∑Bye-li-pu-s a nipiazih, kilul maala ku "muliyaw mitakus tu sakauzip a nabalucu'an". ci Low-cye-s mala u sapitanam tu icelangay a hitay, mizawisay ci Ye-sebu¬∑Lye-ing-s-tan pow-se "Dr. Josef Reinstein" misanga' tu miccidekay a izang, zikuz hinisa ku hitayay caay ku tatenga'ay a singangan ci Lye-ing-s-tan pow-se u ke-sye-cye ci Ya-pow-la-han. malahici ku izang mala u bangcalay tu a tademaw ci S-te-bu, kaicelangen ku tademaw, taliktik, makahemhem atu sipunu'. malahici kuyni nisabalucu'an maydih ci E-s-cin tuynian a nigingkiwan pasengi tu zima a tademaw. mikeliday nu Ameylika tu pinaay a mihcaan tahekal ayzaay a manggaan, makay sakatusa tu tabakiay a ngangayaw nu kitakit mangangayaw atu Na-suy-tang, tayza haca milebu tu baluhay a ada nju Ameylika. itawyaay a kungkuan katuud ku micukaymasay tu ngangan nu mik a kangangayaw nu kitakit mikelulay ci Wi-lyem¬∑Na-s-lang-t eliday nu Ameylika. zikuzan nu sakatusa nu tabakiay e atu ci Cye-bu-luy¬∑Mey-s. sazikuzay u mikeliday nu Ameylika ci Wi-lyen¬∑Pow-en-say-te manamuh tu mikeliday nu Ameylika tu kasenengan tu nikauzip a likisiay nu pahezekay micudad, micici' ciniza tu uzip misumad tu hekal masa ni Low-cye-s ku bihid, matatudungay tu hulic ku nisumad tu ngangan "ci S-ti-bu¬∑Low-cye-s" han, malabaluhay nu "1950 a zidayan a mikeliday nu Ameylika". pabeli cinizaantu atu micudaday nizi ci Cye-ke¬∑Men-low micukaymas tu papepi'ay tu nu icelangay hitay a izang. azihan, yu uheni tatusa mala baluhay mikeliday nu Ameylika atu ci Pa-ci hawsa, masumad kuheni makatal atu misakinih, i sumanahay tu katalawan hina patellid tu tademaw. malawlaw ku balucu' nuheni pacici' tu Ameylika a cen-bu papipazeng tu henian i tatudungay a akutiay, katukuh mangaay ku singki a imelang nuheni. ÁĶźśěú, . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natatinengan
